subject: physics
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ1.14
question_html:
A light source of power P is observed from a distance d. The power of the source is then halved.

At what distance from the source will the intensity be the same as before?

A.  d2

B.  d2

C.  d4

D.  d8
examiners_html: SL candidate responses were divided across options A, B and C, and so this question would be a useful teaching tool for exploring the relationship between power, intensity and distance.
